trans-unit.note: Table MS - Image Analyzer Tags - Property Caption
%1 is the attribute name (ex 'Color')
Table MS - Image Analyzer Tags - NamedType AttributeAlreadyAssignedErr
Table MS - Image Analyzer Tags - NamedType ChooseItemAttributeTxt
%1 is the item attribute name (ex 'Color'), %2 is the item attribute value (ex 'Blue')
Table MS - Image Analyzer Tags - NamedType DetailsTextForItemAttributeTxt
%1 is the item attribute category code (ex 'FURNITURE')
Table MS - Image Analyzer Tags - NamedType DetailsTextForItemCategoryTxt

trans-unit.source: You can choose only one attribute as the item category.
trans-unit.target: Du kan velge bare ett attributt som varekategorien.
trans-unit.note: Table MS - Image Analyzer Tags - NamedType SetOnlyOneTagAsItemCategoryErr
Table MS - Image Analyzer Tags - Field Action To Perform - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Ignore,Use as category,Use as attribute,Add to blocklist
trans-unit.target: Ignorer,Bruk som kategori,Bruk som attributt,Legg til i blokkeringsliste
trans-unit.note: Table MS - Image Analyzer Tags - Field Action To Perform - Property OptionCaption
Table MS - Image Analyzer Tags - Field Details Text - Property Caption
Table MS - Image Analyzer Tags - Field Detected On Item No - Property Caption
Table MS - Image Analyzer Tags - Field Item Attribute Name - Property Caption
Table MS - Image Analyzer Tags - Field Item Attribute Name Id - Property Caption
Table MS - Image Analyzer Tags - Field Item Attribute Value Id - Property Caption
Table MS - Image Analyzer Tags - Field Item Attribute Value Name - Property Caption
Table MS - Image Analyzer Tags - Field Item Category Code - Property Caption
Table MS - Image Analyzer Tags - Field Newly Created Item Category Code - Property Caption
Table MS - Image Analyzer Tags - Field Tag Confidence - Property Caption
Table MS - Image Analyzer Tags - Field Tag Name - Property Caption
Table MS - Img. Analyzer Blacklist - Property Caption
Table MS - Img. Analyzer Blacklist - Field TagName - Property Caption
Codeunit Contact Picture Analyze - NamedType AgeProfileQuestionTxt
Codeunit Contact Picture Analyze - NamedType FemaleTok
Codeunit Contact Picture Analyze - NamedType GenderProfileQuestionTxt
Should be less than or equal to 50 characters.
Codeunit Contact Picture Analyze - NamedType ImageAnalyzerContactQuestionnaireDescriptionTxt
Should be less than or equal to 20 characters.
Codeunit Contact Picture Analyze - NamedType ImageAnalyzerQuestionnaireCodeTxt
Codeunit Contact Picture Analyze - NamedType MaleTok

trans-unit.source: Good work! You can view the results of the image analysis on the Profile Questionnaire FastTab.
trans-unit.target: Bra jobba! Du kan vise resultatene av bildeanalysen i hurtigfanen Profilspørreskjema.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Contact Picture Analyze - NamedType ProfileQuestionnairePopulatedTxt

trans-unit.source: Looks like the Image Analyzer extension is disabled. Do you want to learn more and enable it?
trans-unit.target: Det ser ut som at bildeanalyseutvidelsen er deaktivert. Vil du finne ut mer og aktivere den?
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Image Analyzer Ext. Mgt. - NamedType AnalyzerDisabledMsg
Codeunit Image Analyzer Ext. Mgt. - NamedType ContactQuestionnairePopulatedNameTxt

trans-unit.source: Notify me when Image Analyzer has been used in profile questionnaire to analyze a picture of a contact.
trans-unit.target: Varsle meg når bildeanalysen har blitt brukt i profilspørreskjemaet til å analysere et bilde av en kontakt.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Image Analyzer Ext. Mgt. - NamedType ContactQuestionnairePopulatedNotificationDescriptionTxt
Codeunit Image Analyzer Ext. Mgt. - NamedType GotItTxt

trans-unit.source: The Image Analyzer extension uses powerful image analytics to detect attributes in the images that you add to items and contact persons, so you can easily review and assign them. Set it up now.
trans-unit.target: Utvidelsen Bildeanalyse bruker kraftige bildeanalyser til å finne attributter i bildene du legger til i varer og kontaktpersoner, slik at du lett kan se gjennom og tildele dem. Konfigurer den nå.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Image Analyzer Ext. Mgt. - NamedType ImageAnalysisWizardDescriptionTxt
Codeunit Image Analyzer Ext. Mgt. - NamedType ImageAnalysisWizardShortTitleTxt
Codeunit Image Analyzer Ext. Mgt. - NamedType ImageAnalysisWizardTitleTxt
Codeunit Image Analyzer Ext. Mgt. - NamedType NeverShowAgainTxt
Codeunit Image Analyzer Ext. Mgt. - NamedType OpenSetupTxt
Codeunit Image Analyzer Ext. Mgt. - NamedType SetupActionTxt

trans-unit.source: Notify me that the Image Analyzer extension can suggest attributes detected in imported images.
trans-unit.target: Varsle meg om at bildeanalyseutvidelsen kan foreslå attributter som ble oppdaget i importerte bilder.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Image Analyzer Ext. Mgt. - NamedType SetupNotificationDescriptionTxt
Codeunit Image Analyzer Ext. Mgt. - NamedType SetupNotificationNameTxt

trans-unit.source: Notify me that the maximum number of image analyses allowed in the period is already reached.
trans-unit.target: Varsle meg om at det maksimale antallet bildeanalyser som er tillatt i perioden, allerede er nådd.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Image Analyzer Ext. Mgt. - NamedType TooManyCallsErrorNotificationDescriptionTxt

trans-unit.source: Image analysis usage limit already reached
trans-unit.target: Grense for bruk av bildeanalyse er allerede nådd
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Image Analyzer Ext. Mgt. - NamedType TooManyCallsNotificationErrorNameTxt

trans-unit.target: Grense for bruk av bildeanalyse er nådd
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Image Analyzer Ext. Mgt. - NamedType TooManyCallsNotificationWarningNameTxt

trans-unit.source: You just reached the limit of analyzed images. You can analyze %1 images per %2. You'll have to wait until the beginning of the next %2 to analyze more images.
trans-unit.target: Du nådde akkurat grensen for analyserte bilder. Du kan analysere %1 bilder per %2. Du må vente til starten av neste %2 for å analysere flere bilder.
trans-unit.note: %1 is the number of calls per time unit allowed, %2 is the time unit duration (year, month, day, or hour)
Codeunit Image Analyzer Ext. Mgt. - NamedType TooManyCallsWarningMsg

trans-unit.source: Notify me when I reach the maximum number of image analyses allowed in the period.
trans-unit.target: Varsle meg når jeg når det maksimale antallet bildeanalyser som er tillatt i perioden.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Image Analyzer Ext. Mgt. - NamedType TooManyCallsWarningNotificationDescriptionTxt

trans-unit.source: Sorry, we didn't spot any attributes in the image. This happens occasionally. For example, sometimes we need more contrast between the item and the background. If you want, try another image.
trans-unit.target: Beklager. Fant ingen attributter i bildet. Dette skjer noen ganger. Noen ganger trenger vi for eksempel mer kontrast mellom elementet og bakgrunnen. Hvis du vil, kan du prøve et annet bilde.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Item Attr Populate - NamedType NoAttributesIdentifiedTxt
Page Image Analysis Blacklist - Property Caption
Page Image Analysis Blacklist - Control ItemCode - Property ToolTip
Blocklist is used to prevent the selected attributes from being suggested in the future.
Page Image Analysis Tags - Property PromotedActionCategories
Page Image Analysis Tags - Property Caption
Page Image Analysis Tags - NamedType AppendTagTxt
Page Image Analysis Tags - Control ItemDescriptionGroup - Property Caption
Page Image Analysis Tags - Control ActionToPerform - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the tag to append to item description.
trans-unit.target: Angir koden for å tilføye varebeskrivelsen.
trans-unit.note: Page Image Analysis Tags - Control AppendToDescription - Property ToolTip
Page Image Analysis Tags - Control AppendToDescription - Property Caption
Page Image Analysis Tags - Control DetailsText - Property ToolTip
Page Image Analysis Tags - Control TagConfidence - Property ToolTip
Page Image Analysis Tags - Control TagName - Property ToolTip
Page Image Analysis Tags - Action BlacklistGroup - Property Caption
Page Image Analysis Tags - Action ViewBlacklistedTags - Property Caption
Page Image Analysis Tags - Action FilterAttributesGroup - Property Caption
Page Image Analysis Tags - Action FilterLowConfidence - Property Caption
Page Image Analysis Tags - Action RemoveFilterLowConfidence - Property Caption
Page Image Analyzer Wizard - Property Caption

trans-unit.target: Velg Fullfør for å aktivere Bildeanalyse.
trans-unit.note: Page Image Analyzer Wizard - NamedType ChooseFinishTxt
Page Image Analyzer Wizard - NamedType CognitiveServicesLinkTxt

trans-unit.source: By enabling the Image Analyzer extension you consent to sharing your data with an external system. For more information, see the documentation.
trans-unit.target: Ved å aktivere bildeanalyseutvidelsen godtar du å dele data med et eksternt system. Se dokumentasjonen for mer informasjon.
trans-unit.note: Page Image Analyzer Wizard - NamedType ConsentTxt

trans-unit.source: Image Analyzer automatically detects attributes when you add an image to an item or contact person.
trans-unit.target: Bildeanalyse oppdager attributter automatisk når du legger til et bilde i en vare eller kontaktperson.
trans-unit.note: Page Image Analyzer Wizard - NamedType HowToPart1Txt

trans-unit.source: To analyze images you've already uploaded, go to the item or contact person card, and choose the 'Analyze Picture' action.
trans-unit.target: Hvis du vil analysere bilder du allerede har lastet opp, går du til vare- eller kontaktpersonkortet og velger handlingen Analyser bilde.
trans-unit.note: Page Image Analyzer Wizard - NamedType HowToPart2Txt
Page Image Analyzer Wizard - NamedType ImageAnalyzerDocumentationLinkTxt
Page Image Analyzer Wizard - NamedType ImageAnalyzerDocumentationTxt
Page Image Analyzer Wizard - NamedType LearnMoreLinkTxt
Page Image Analyzer Wizard - NamedType LearnMoreStatementLinkTxt
Page Image Analyzer Wizard - NamedType OnlineServicesTermLinkTxt
Page Image Analyzer Wizard - NamedType PrivacyStatementLinkLinkTxt
Page Image Analyzer Wizard - NamedType PrivacyStatementLinkTxt

trans-unit.source: Your use of the Image Analyzer may be subject to the additional licensing terms in the Microsoft Cognitive Services section of the Online Services Terms.
trans-unit.target: Din bruk av Bildeanalyse kan være underlagt de ekstra lisensvilkårene i delen Microsoft Cognitive Services av de elektroniske tjenestevilkårene.
trans-unit.note: Page Image Analyzer Wizard - NamedType TermsPartTxt

trans-unit.source: An image has been added to the chosen item or contact. Want to analyze the image, right after you enable Image Analyzer?
trans-unit.target: Et bilde har blitt lagt til i den valgte varen eller kontaktpersonen. Vil du analysere bildet rett etter at du aktiverer Bildeanalyse?
trans-unit.note: Page Image Analyzer Wizard - NamedType WantToAnalyzeTheCurrentPictureQst

trans-unit.source: To learn more about Cognitive Services and the Computer Vision API, see the documentation.
trans-unit.target: Hvis du vil finne ut mer om Cognitive Services og API for Visuelt innhold, kan du se dokumentasjonen.
trans-unit.note: Page Image Analyzer Wizard - NamedType YouCanLearnMoreTxt
Page Image Analyzer Wizard - Control FinalPage - Property Caption
Page Image Analyzer Wizard - Control That's it! - Property Caption
Page Image Analyzer Wizard - Control AnalyzePicture - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Start analysis of the current picture.
trans-unit.note: Page Image Analyzer Wizard - Control AnalyzePictureOnFinish - Property ToolTip
Page Image Analyzer Wizard - Control AnalyzePictureOnFinish - Property Caption
Page Image Analyzer Wizard - Control ChooseFinishGroup - Property Caption
Page Image Analyzer Wizard - Control HowToGroup - Property Caption
Page Image Analyzer Wizard - Control FirstPage - Property Caption
Page Image Analyzer Wizard - Control Welcome to the Wizard - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Image Analyzer uses the Computer Vision API from Microsoft Cognitive Services to detect attributes in the images you upload for items and contact persons, so it's easy for you to assign them. For items, Image Analyzer finds attributes like type and color. For contact persons, it detects age and gender.
trans-unit.target: Bildeanalyse bruker API for Visuelt innhold fra Microsoft Cognitive Services til å oppdage attributter i bildene du laster opp for varer og kontaktpersoner, så derfor er det enkelt å tilordne dem. For varer finner Bildeanalyse attributter som type og farge, mens for kontaktpersoner oppdages alder og kjønn.
trans-unit.note: Page Image Analyzer Wizard - Control TourGroup - Property InstructionalText
Page Image Analyzer Wizard - Control TourGroup - Property Caption
Page Image Analyzer Wizard - Control LearnMoreLinkGroup - Property Caption
Page Image Analyzer Wizard - Control MediaStandard - Property Caption
Page Image Analyzer Wizard - Control SecondPage - Property Caption
Page Image Analyzer Wizard - Control Terms of use - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies if the feature is enabled.
trans-unit.note: Page Image Analyzer Wizard - Control EnableFeature - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: I understand and accept these terms
trans-unit.target: Jeg forstår og godtar disse vilkårene
trans-unit.note: Page Image Analyzer Wizard - Control EnableFeature - Property Caption
Page Image Analyzer Wizard - Action ActionBack - Property Caption
Page Image Analyzer Wizard - Action ActionFinishAndEnable - Property Caption
Page Image Analyzer Wizard - Action ActionNext - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: The contact you're analyzing a picture of is a company, not a person. The contact must be a person.
trans-unit.target: Kontakten du analyserer et bilde av, er et selskap og ikke en person. Kontakten må være en person.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension 1450496495

trans-unit.source: Analyze the picture attached to the contact to identify gender and age, and assign them to the contact.
trans-unit.target: Analyser bildet som er tilknyttet kontakten, for å identifisere kjønn og alderen, og knytte bildet til kontakten.

trans-unit.source: View attributes that are currently blocked.
trans-unit.target: Vis attributter som for øyeblikket er sperret.

trans-unit.source: Specifies the confidence score threshold for results from Microsoft Cognitive Services. Results with confidence below the threshold are considered inaccurate, and are not used. A typical threshold is 80%.
trans-unit.target: Angir terskelen for konfidensresultat for resultater fra Microsoft Cognitive Services. Resultater med konfidens under terskelen, anses som unøyaktige og brukes ikke. En vanlig terskel er 80 %.

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether to use the Image Analyzer extension to suggest attributes that it detects in images of items and contact persons.
trans-unit.target: Angir om du vil bruke bildeanalyseutvidelsen til å foreslå attributter som den oppdager i bilder av varer og kontaktpersoner.

trans-unit.source: Analyze the picture attached to the item to identify attributes and item category, and assign them to the item.
trans-unit.target: Analyser bildet som er tilknyttet varen, for å identifisere attributter og varekategori, og knytte bildet til varen.

trans-unit.source: To enable image analysis, you must be an administrator. Ensure that you are assigned the 'SUPER' user permission set.
trans-unit.target: Hvis du vil aktivere Bildeanalyse, må du være administrator. Kontroller at du har tilordnet tillatelsessettet SUPER-bruker.
trans-unit.note: TableExtension 214061687
PermissionSet ImageAnalysis - Edit - Property Caption
PermissionSet ImageAnalysis - Objects - Property Caption
PermissionSet ImageAnalysis - Read - Property Caption
